item.title: TIL: Saturn’s North Pole is a massive hexagon.

item.title: The dolt has gone full lunatic.
item.description: Spain, a friendly western democracy has 50 million population and is a major global producer and exporter of agricultural products—notably olive oil (leading global exporter), wine, citrus fruits, and vegetables. Its economy also relies on exporting automobiles, vehicle components, machinery, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and clothing. Key export partners include France, Germany, Portugal, Italy, and the US.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Kenlifeofclay sculpted this and it's fantastic. Check out their other work in their posts, spider warning though!
27 Man Tax: Michael B. Jordan
“We're told every day, "You can't change the world." But the world is changing every day. Only question is … who's doing it? You or somebody else?” - J. Michael Straczynski So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Coming home.
item.description:
Ukrainian Defender Serhii, callsign "Nebo," called his wife and daughter to tell them that he had returned from his positions.
He and his brothers-in-arms from the 2nd Battalion of the 117th Territorial Defense Brigade spent 100 days at the positions in harsh winter conditions and under enemy pressure. Free Europe rests on these shoulders.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: PTGDump: Memes I Send My Wife Vol. XIV
item.description:
Hello everyone! Hope y'all had some *really good* coffee this morning.
Cross-post from my fitness meme folder.
Female rage will save us all.
It gives me the happy chemicals.
It's basic science!
This basically happened last week. Artist is @murrzstudio
This dump is very cat-centric, I'm realizing.
Wife is a redhead. Mornings are like this sometimes.
What's your dream Lego set?
What service! 5/7 stars!
Her when I send a picture of me in my hoochie daddy cargo jorts.
Cross-post from my feisty memes folder.
"It's not hungry, or even sleepy. It's like my heart is hard." - Gob Bluth
Brilliant.
Kinda true, although the cat sleeps down by my feet, despite the 20% chance of getting shoved off the bed by accident when I turn over.
Like she needs me to tell her that. But I supply enough whimsy for the both of us.
What movie they watching?
Can we go for 38nt?
Her fault. Not mine.
Never calm them. Keep them feral and wily.
I'm really just a silly little guy.
We have a friend who does pottery, and makes really cool mugs. Not a plug, but she'd be down to make something like this.
Better be some slightly bigger than medium-sized donuts, knowwhatImean?
*Smooch*
Whoops, married. It's a slippery slope.
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
We went on an amazing date last week when the kid was at a sleepover. Dinner and drinks, home by 8, in bed by 8:45. Perfect.
30 minutes? What am I, a machine?
Another cross-post from my fitness meme folder. Fuck skinny. Stay furious and jacked, ladies.
It does not go well when we try to assemble things as a family.
Thanks for reading everyone! This dump has been brought to you by... ...my gaming channel on the YouTubes! It's growing, and I want to take as many Imgur content creators along with me as I can. If you have a channel you want to promote, be it Twitch, YouTube or otherwise, let me know! Send me a link and I'll promote you in a future dump. And swing by the channel if you have some time to kill, or just need a pleasantly deep voice in the background while you do whatever. Right now, I'm playing Monkey Island 2! youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: If I know Microslop, it will be so much terrible than we can imagine.
item.description: https://bsky.app/profile/shoshana.bsky.social/post/3mg74rkzo7223 Obligatory Linux mention, you don’t have to put up with Microsoft and their wacky software, there is a better way forward. Actually, there are 24 better ways forward: https://www.linux.org/pages/download/ I’m a college dropout, with underwhelming intelligence, and I have a mild grasp of English and computers. I have been using Linux since (fuck, I actually forgot the year windows 8 came out). My point being, don’t shell out cash for microslop; get you a nice, stable distro of Linux, and feel the freedom of open source software. (I’ve been informed by reliable sources that I am now on a watch list because I used the word ‘microslop’ in my other posts. If I suddenly stop posting, y’all can
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Ukrainian road sign, “Go fuck yourself” “Go fuck yourself again” “Go fuck yourself back in Russia”
item.description: Feb 2022. At the time, Ukrainians were actively changing signs and maps as a subtle form of psychological warfare to confuse and demoralize the invaders.

item.title: Breakfast served all day
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: It's Wednesday my dudes, and lady dudes.
item.description: It was my second year of college where I began to notice a strange curiosity of my female friends at the time. There was no 1 out of 3, or even a 2 out of 3; each and every one of them had been sexually assaulted, 8 for 8. It was then that my eyes were opened to just how out of control this whole world had gotten or worse, perhaps remained. Women I trust that most of you are doing your best, but IF you aren't let this be your sign. Talk to your daughters, your nieces, your cousins; have them set hard lines on boundaries, don't let anyone cross them, and know that sometimes the best thing you can do is say no and remove them or yourself from the situation. Oh and for the love all that is holy, no secondary locations!! Men, we're failing, and all of us are responsible. Because it was our fathers or uncles or brothers or cousins or nephews or friends, and we never checked them, we possibly heard stories and did nothing about it. So talk to all the men and boys in your family and make them listen, DON'T ASSUME IT'S SOMEONE ELSE'S RESPONSIBILITY. Discuss with them that verbal informed consent is a must, and just because you have it once does not make it universal to every occasion or action in those occasions. And this is not to discount the number of cases where the sexes are not male attacking female, but damn it we can only attack so many epidemics at a time. Finally believe the survivors, when they spill their stories, all of them have gone through horrific events and for a lot of them it will not be easy to recount the details for you, or an interview, or for a defending attorney and a jury.
item.dc:creator: Discoball10

item.title: Convicted felon and known pedophile will burn the whole world just to protect his Epstein files and pedo friends
item.description: Representative Ted Lieu has reportedly stated that newly released, comprehensive Epstein files contains allegations that Donald Trump raped children. This explosive claim adds a severe new dimension to the domestic political crisis already surrounding the White House during the current Middle East war. The timing of these allegations coincides with a staggering 80% of Americans believing that the ongoing conflict with Iran was initiated as a strategic diversion from the Epstein files. This public skepticism persists even as the war escalates to a global scale, with Dmitri Medvedev warning that World War III could begin at any moment if current military actions continue. The military situation remains critical, as the IRGC has announced plans to launch its first intercontinental ballistic missiles (ICBMs) from the Persian Gulf. Simultaneously, the U.S. is considering moving THAAD and Patriot defense systems from South Korea to the Middle East due to critically low interceptor stockpiles. On the diplomatic front, the coalition is fracturing following Senator Marco Rubio's admission that Israel "forced" the U.S. into the conflict. International oversight has also collapsed, with the IAEA reporting a total loss of contact with Iran's nuclear agency amidst claims that Tehran has enough uranium for 11 nuclear bombs. As Representative Lieu’s statements circulate, the administration faces an unprecedented combination of high-stakes military threats and devastating personal allegations. The international community continues to watch for the "big one" promised by President Trump, even as domestic legal and ethical challenges reach a breaking point
item.dc:creator: MithrandirGi

item.title: GovBrief Today #397
item.description: Kristi Noem spent the training budget on herself and her friends. She commissioned nearly a quarter billion dollars in ads routed to a company her spokesperson's husband set up 11 days before the contract was awarded, then starred in them herself on horseback at Mount Rushmore. While she was doing that, she cut ICE training by 40% and eliminated most of their hands-on evaluation before sending 900 agents into the field. At today's Senate hearing, Republican Sen. John Kennedy called it "spending porn." Sen. Thom Tillis called her leadership "a disaster." Committee chairman Chuck Grassley, a Republican, said "mistakes were made." It's not just Congress. A federal judge in New Jersey ordered ICE agents to sign declarations under penalty of perjury after finding 17 violations in three months. In Minnesota, Chief Judge Patrick Schiltz has documented more than 200 violations and is threatening criminal contempt, which could mean jail time for federal officials. He wrote that he knows of no other moment in American history when a court had to threaten contempt "again and again and again" to force the government to follow the law. Call your representatives today. Demand Kristi Noem's resignation. If she refuses to go, demand her impeachment. We've emailed 6,400+ stories over 397 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-spain-threat [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar3 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/usn-escorts-hormuz [4] https://go.govbrief.today/dilley-measles [5] https://go.govbrief.today/lutnick-testifying [6] https://go.govbrief.today/ecuador-military [7] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-reverses-firm [8] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-nyc-congestion [9] https://go.govbrief.today/winder-shooter-father [10] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-training-cuts [11] https://go.govbrief.today/labor-aides-resign [12] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-testimony [13] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-nyc-congestion [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-orders-writing Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
